channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (far_out)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Outside Lands @ Golden Gate Park
item.description: 2026-08-07 19:00 → 2026-08-08 18:00 — Outside Lands at Golden Gate Park. The Outside Lands Festival is a major event in the Bay Area, showcasing a diverse lineup of popular and emerging artists.

item.title: Bilmuri @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-10-05 02:00 — Bilmuri at The Masonic. Bilmuri's Kinda Hard Tour promises an engaging live performance from a rising artist known for his unique sound.

item.title: Rise Against @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-10-23 02:00 — Rise Against at The Masonic. Rise Against is a well-respected band in the punk rock scene, known for their energetic live shows and socially conscious lyrics.

item.title: Cristian Castro @ San Jose Civic
item.description: 2026-09-27 03:00 — Cristian Castro at San Jose Civic. Cristian Castro is a prominent figure in Latin music, and his tour is likely to attract a dedicated fanbase.

item.title: Lily Allen @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-09-24 03:00 — Lily Allen at Chase Center. Lily Allen's performance is a chance to see a beloved pop artist known for her witty lyrics and engaging stage presence.

item.title: IVE @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-08-05 03:00 — IVE at Oakland Arena. IVE's world tour is generating buzz in the K-pop scene, promising a vibrant and energetic show.

item.title: i-dle @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-08-22 03:00 — i-dle at Oakland Arena. i-dle is a rising K-pop group with a strong following, making their tour a significant event for fans.

item.title: Jack Johnson @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-10-01 01:30 → 2026-10-02 01:30 — Jack Johnson at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Jack Johnson's tour is a draw for fans of laid-back acoustic music, offering a relaxing concert experience.

item.title: Eagles of Death Metal @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-09-02 03:00 — Eagles of Death Metal at The Fillmore. Eagles of Death Metal's tour is a chance to see a band known for their high-energy performances and rock anthems.

item.title: Benson Boone @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-08-08 03:00 — Benson Boone at SAP Center at San Jose. Benson Boone is gaining traction as a new artist, and his tour could showcase his potential to a wider audience.

item.title: RUSH @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-10-18 02:30 — RUSH at SAP Center at San Jose. Gorillaz's tour is highly anticipated, featuring a unique blend of genres and a visually stunning live show.

item.title: Bleachers @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-09-18 01:30 — Bleachers at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Courtney Barnett's tour is a must-see for indie rock fans, known for her clever songwriting and engaging performances.

item.title: Bonnie Raitt @ The Theater at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-10-11 03:00 — Bonnie Raitt at The Theater at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. Bonnie Raitt's concert is a chance to see a legendary artist with a rich history in blues and rock music.

item.title: Passion Pit @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-08-17 02:30 — Passion Pit at Fox Theater - Oakland. Passion Pit's return to the stage is exciting for fans of indie pop, promising a vibrant live experience.

item.title: Old 97's @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-08-06 03:00 — Old 97's at The Fillmore. The Neighbourhood's tour is a highlight for fans of alternative music, known for their atmospheric sound.

item.title: Josh Garrels @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-11-05 03:00 — Josh Garrels at August Hall. J. Cole's tour is a major event for hip-hop fans, showcasing one of the genre's leading artists.

item.title: Simple Plan @ San Jose Civic
item.description: 2026-07-29 02:00 — Simple Plan at San Jose Civic.
